languages.text: "Реликвия, единственная в своем роде и древняя как само судно, была повреждена во время бунта предателя Войгтвира, и с тех пор, несмотря на неустанные бдения техножрецов, ее машинным духам становится хуже. Мы рискуем ее потерять безвозвратно".

"The relic is unique and as old as the ship itself. It was damaged during the traitor Voigtvir's mutiny. Despite the Tech-Priests' ceaseless prayers, its machine spirits continue to fade. It may soon be irretrievably lost."
languages.original_text: "Реликвия, единственная в своем роде и древняя как само судно, была повреждена во время бунта предателя Войгтвира, и с тех пор, несмотря на неустанные бдения техножрецов, ее машинным духам становится хуже. Мы рискуем ее потерять безвозвратно".

traits.locale_text: "The relic is one of a kind and as old as the ship itself. It was damaged during the traitor Voigtvir's mutiny. Despite the Tech-Priests' endless prayers, its machine spirits continue to fade. We may soon lose it irrevocably."

"The relic is one of a kind and as old as the ship itself. It was damaged during the traitor Voigtvir's mutiny. Despite the Tech-Priests' endless prayers, its machine spirits continue to fade. We may soon lose it irrevocably."

"The relic is unique and as old as the ship itself. It was damaged during the traitor Voigtvir's mutiny. Despite the Tech-Priests' ceaseless prayers, its machine spirits continue to fade. It may soon be irretrievably lost."

"The relic is unique and as old as the ship itself. It was damaged during the traitor Voigtvir's mutiny. Despite the Tech-Priests' ceaseless prayers, its machine spirits continue to fade. It may soon be irretrievably lost."

languages.text: “这件圣物独一无二，其古老程度不亚于舰船本身。它在叛徒维特威尔发动叛乱时受损。尽管技术神甫们不断祈祷，它的机魂仍在持续衰退。恐怕它很快就会湮灭，再无挽回的可能。”
languages.original_text: "The relic is unique and as old as the ship itself. It was damaged during the traitor Voigtvir's mutiny. Despite the Tech-Priests' ceaseless prayers, its machine spirits continue to fade. It may soon be irretrievably lost."

traits.locale_text: “这件圣物独一无二，其古老程度不亚于舰船本身。它在叛徒维特威尔发动叛乱时受损。尽管技术神甫们不断祈祷，它的机魂仍在持续衰退。恐怕它很快就会湮灭，再无挽回的可能。”

languages.text: «La reliquia es única, y tan antigua como la propia nave. Resultó dañada durante el motín del traicionero Voigtvir. A pesar de los incesantes rezos de los tecnosacerdotes, sus espíritus máquina se están consumiendo. Pronto la perderemos irrevocablemente».
languages.original_text: "The relic is unique and as old as the ship itself. It was damaged during the traitor Voigtvir's mutiny. Despite the Tech-Priests' ceaseless prayers, its machine spirits continue to fade. It may soon be irretrievably lost."

traits.locale_text: «La reliquia es única, y tan antigua como la propia nave. Resultó dañada durante el motín del traicionero Voigtvir. A pesar de los incesantes rezos de los tecnosacerdotes, sus espíritus máquina se están consumiendo. Pronto la perderemos irrevocablemente».

languages.text: « La relique est unique et aussi ancienne que le vaisseau. Elle a été endommagée lors de la mutinerie du traître Voigtvir. Malgré les prières incessantes des technoprêtres, les esprits de la machine continuent de s'éteindre. Nous risquons bientôt de la perdre pour de bon. »
languages.original_text: "The relic is unique and as old as the ship itself. It was damaged during the traitor Voigtvir's mutiny. Despite the Tech-Priests' ceaseless prayers, its machine spirits continue to fade. It may soon be irretrievably lost."

traits.locale_text: « La relique est unique et aussi ancienne que le vaisseau. Elle a été endommagée lors de la mutinerie du traître Voigtvir. Malgré les prières incessantes des technoprêtres, les esprits de la machine continuent de s'éteindre. Nous risquons bientôt de la perdre pour de bon. »

languages.text: "Das Relikt ist einzigartig und so alt wie das Schiff selbst. Es wurde während der Meuterei des Verräters Voigtvir beschädigt. Trotz der unaufhörlichen Gebete der Techpriester schwinden die Maschinengeister weiter. Bald könnten sie unwiederbringlich verloren sein."
languages.original_text: "The relic is unique and as old as the ship itself. It was damaged during the traitor Voigtvir's mutiny. Despite the Tech-Priests' ceaseless prayers, its machine spirits continue to fade. It may soon be irretrievably lost."

traits.locale_text: "Das Relikt ist einzigartig und so alt wie das Schiff selbst. Es wurde während der Meuterei des Verräters Voigtvir beschädigt. Trotz der unaufhörlichen Gebete der Techpriester schwinden die Maschinengeister weiter. Bald könnten sie unwiederbringlich verloren sein."

languages.text: "Yadigâr eşsizdir, geminin kendisi kadar eskidir. Hain Voigtvir'in isyanı sırasında hasar gördü. Tekno Rahiplerin bitmek bilmeyen dualarına rağmen makine ruhları solmaya devam ediyor. Yakında geri döndürülemez bir şekilde kaybolabilir."
languages.original_text: "The relic is unique and as old as the ship itself. It was damaged during the traitor Voigtvir's mutiny. Despite the Tech-Priests' ceaseless prayers, its machine spirits continue to fade. It may soon be irretrievably lost."

traits.locale_text: "Yadigâr eşsizdir, geminin kendisi kadar eskidir. Hain Voigtvir'in isyanı sırasında hasar gördü. Tekno Rahiplerin bitmek bilmeyen dualarına rağmen makine ruhları solmaya devam ediyor. Yakında geri döndürülemez bir şekilde kaybolabilir."

languages.text: 「この遺物は、この船と同じくらい古く、唯一無二のもの。裏切り者ヴォイストヴィルの反乱で損傷を受け、テクプリストの絶え間ない祈りのにもかかわらず、機械霊は衰え続けている。まもなく、取り返しのつかない損失となるかもしれない。」
languages.original_text: "The relic is unique and as old as the ship itself. It was damaged during the traitor Voigtvir's mutiny. Despite the Tech-Priests' ceaseless prayers, its machine spirits continue to fade. It may soon be irretrievably lost."

traits.locale_text: 「この遺物は、この船と同じくらい古く、唯一無二のもの。裏切り者ヴォイストヴィルの反乱で損傷を受け、テクプリストの絶え間ない祈りのにもかかわらず、機械霊は衰え続けている。まもなく、取り返しのつかない損失となるかもしれない。」
